full_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad

facts: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad district, Jharkhand - 826004.
Formerly known as Indian School of Mines, established in 1926.
One of the oldest technical institutions in India.

hostels.name: Aquamarine
hostels.for: 4th yr UG, 3rd yr UG (23E), 1st yr PhD (newly admitted July 2025), Integrated M.Tech (20E & 21E) + Dual Degree, Double Major

hostels.name: Jasper
hostels.for: 1st yr B.Tech including Prep, 8th yr PhD, 7th yr PhD, 6th-4th yr PhD (multiple departments), 2nd yr PhD, 1st yr PhD (shifted from Sapphire)

hostels.name: Amber
hostels.for: 2nd yr UG (24E), 2nd yr MBA, 2nd yr M.Sc, 3rd/2nd yr M.Tech, 2nd yr MA, Internship M.Tech 2nd yr, 1st yr PhD (newly admitted July 2025), Summer sem backlog

hostels.name: Topaz
hostels.for: 5th yr Ph.D, 4th yr Ph.D, 2nd yr Ph.D, 1st yr Ph.D/MMS

hostels.name: Diamond
hostels.for: 3rd yr M.Sc, 1st yr M.A, 1st yr M.Sc Tech

hostels_boys.sharing: Every hostel has 2 members per room except New Rosaline (1st, 2nd, 3rd year) which has 3 members per room.

hostels.name: Emerald
hostels.for: 3rd yr PhD, 2nd yr PhD, 1st yr PhD, Int. PhD

hostels.name: Ruby & Rosaline
hostels.for: 4th yr B.Tech, 2nd yr B.Tech, M.Sc Tech, M.Tech, MBA, MA, 1st yr PhD (newly July 2025), 1st yr B.Tech

facts: Every hostel has their own mess.

fee_structure.note: Fee structure from official consolidated fee payment table (Annexure A). B.Tech/M.Tech/Dual Degree fees visible in image.
fee_structure.btech_approximate: First semester total approximately Rs 2,25,000+ (includes tuition Rs 1,00,000, hostel, mess, one-time fees). Exact breakdown from image OCR needed for precision.
fee_structure.status: Fee image kept for reference — detailed extraction pending

facts: WiFi available across campus.
WiFi and LAN available in every hostel but connection details change per hostel.
No mandatory 75% attendance rule.
Attendance policy is more relaxed compared to other IITs/NITs.

from_directory.name: Data and Software Technology Club (formerly Cyber Labs)

clubs.note: Many more clubs listed in College Directory 2024 PDF.

list.name: Khanan
list.type: Annual Geo-Mining Fest — biggest mining fest in India, 3-day summit

list.name: Srijan
list.type: Biggest Socio-Cultural Fest of Eastern India, since 1977. Annual footfall 30,000+ from 200+ colleges. Prize money Rs 6 lakh+

facts: Parakram is the annual sports fest.
Multiple sports facilities available on campus.
Every hostel has separate canteens.
One main canteen on campus.
Hostels have shops.
Some shops on ground floor of library building.
No washing machines available.
Dhobis (washermen) are available for laundry service.

elections.system: Conducted like state elections — MLA equivalent is Senate, CM equivalent is President.
elections.note: Senate posts are assigned by the President.

facts: If mobile phone taken to exam — back paper for that subject. Depends on professor.
Boys have separate gym.
Girls have separate gym.
Arranged for respective hostels.
Free if checked by doctor on campus.
Dhanbad Junction Railway Station is 4.2 km from campus.
Ranchi Airport is 156 km away.
Kazi Nazrul Airport in Durgapur is 90 km away.
Dhanbad Bus Station nearby.

language_climate.climate: Very cold winters (longer winter season). Very hot summers.
